meaning: adj.可固定的,可确定的,可安装的,可装置的
examples: These issues are all fixable — they're just the six I see most often.
The fixable problem isn't the greed of the few but the misaligned interests of the many.
And because they use the latest stuff, they're in a position to discover valuable types of fixable brokenness first.
But many critical housing issues are local and therefore only fixable by city or state governments.
It is fixable, though, in what we all want to be a Happy New Year.
